EditorSculpt

What's New:
<v1.70>
-Fixed bug that EditorSculpt does'nt work in Unity 6000.3 beta.
 And to fix that, I decide not to use ".dll" file, and unvail Editor Sculpt's source code.
 So now, Editor Sculpt becomes open source software with MIT license.

-Add new display mode "Rendered". It shows rendered model even if "Vertex Color" Brush or "Vertex Weight" brush.

-Add ability to create new material for texture paint. You can do that with press "Create New Material" button that appears when you use "Texture Paint" brush.


<v1.68>
Immediate update for bug fix too.
-Fixed bug that you cann't save a texture when you change a target material to paint.

-fixed bug that texture error occurs in some case.

-Fixed bug that the Scene Camera lost your model in some case when you record sculpt as blendshape with "Animation/Start Record BlendShape" button.

-Fixed bug that Editor Sculpt gets error when you rename blendshape with exist blendshape name with "RenameBlendShape".

-Fixed bug that Editor Sculpt shows unnecessary save mesh dialog in some case.


<v1.67>
Immediate update for bug fix.
-Fixed bug that some models with animations gets error.
 (Mesh made by MIXAMO and accuRIG etc.)

-Fixed bug that Editor sculpt select incorrect mesh when you load mesh with the  "Select Asset Mesh" button in some case with Editor Sculpt 1.66.

-Fixed bug that you cann't sculpt scene mesh in Unity 2019.4 in some case.

-Fixed bug that "Animation Move" brush does'nt work in Unity 2019.4


<v1.66>
-More and more Improve comaptibity of model import.
 Now, more and more meshes works fine that cann't sculpt with the previous version of Editor Sculpt.

-Now Editor Sculpt support FBX 7.5 or above.

-Now Editor Sculpt support MIXAMO and accuRIG with rigs and animations.

-Fixed bug that model misalign when you load model with animations.

-I decide to copy model importer and use copied one for Editor Sculpt.
 This improve compatibility of model import with animations a lot.

-Added new import setting option item in the "Import setting" foldout. "Save in importer folder".
 When you set this option item on, Editor Sculpt saves assets in the same folder as Model Importer.

-Added new import setting option item in the "Import setting" foldout."Import Material Animation".
 When you enable it, Fixes bug that Material Transparent lost in Animation Move brush in some case.
 (MToon material for VRoid Studio etc).

-Adjust camera distance for models.

-Add new option item for the Animation Move brush, "Use KeyFrame Animation".
 When you enable this option item, three save button appears. "Save to a new KeyFrame", "Save to Previous KeyFrame", "Save to Next KeyFrame".
 You can save pose to the keyframe with the these buttons.


<v1.65>
-Add ability to save the original mesh in the memory and you can revert it freely.
 You can do that with "RestoreChanges" button in the "Save/Export" foldout in the Editor Sculpt window.

 -I decide to show the save mesh dialog when you close Editor Sculpt Window similarly to other 2D paint /3D modeling application.
 Now Editor sculpt save the sculpted mesh or painted texture only if you select "OK" in that dialog.
 If not, Editor Sculpt revert original meshfilter completely.
 It preserve the mesh and you can work more safely, but if you dislike this change,
 you can revert it with enabling "Skip the mesh save Dialog" checkbox in the "Show Advanced Options" foldoutin the Editoer Ssculpt window.

-Also you can save meshs and textures manually, with press "Save" button in the "Save/Export" Editor Sculpt window.

-Fixed bug that the material transparent doesn't work with existing model in some case(The Hair of the VRoid Studio imported models etc).

-Fixed crash when you make a primitive mesh with "Tools/EditorSculpt/Create Primitive" menu in the Unity's ediotr menu.

-Rebuild animation move brush. Now, Editor Sculpt saves animation clips only if you press "Save Animation" button whitch appear 
 in the Scene View of Unity Editor when you move bones.
 And, add "Animation save start time(sec)" slider and "Animation save end time(sec)" slider.
 With these changes, you can control the timeline for animation more meticulously.
 But, if you dislike that changes, you can revert it with enable "Legacy Animation" checkbox in the Unity Editor's scene view.

-Add new brush "Move2D". This brush is similar to the "Move" brush, but it locks direction axis.
 You can locks Z axis (Move2D Direction:XY Plane), or X axis(Move2D Direction:YZ Plane)
 ,or Y axis(Move2D Direction:ZX Plane), or Y & Z axis(Move2D Direction:X Direction), or Z & X axis(Move2D Direction:Y Direction) or X & Y axis(Move2D Direction:Z Direction).

-Add ability to copy/paste pose in the animation brush. You can do that with pressing "Copy Pose" button and "Paste Pose" button 
 that appears when you select "Animation Move" brush.

-Add new animation move mode "Paste". It's similar to "Paste Pose" button, but it use the brush and only affect to the bones with brush over.

-Fixed bug that "Add a new Bone" button does'nt work since Editor Sculpt 1.63.

-Fixed bug that animation clip crashes when material has error in some time.

<v1.64>
Immediate update for bug fix.
-Fixed bug that you cann't sculpt some models.

-Fixed bug that the scale for the mesh changes and you become less sculpt when you close the EditorSculpt window and reopen mesh in some case.

-Added safety code to get rid of conflict to other Editor Extensions.  

<v1.63>
-Improve comaptibity of model import a lot.
 Now, most meshes works fine that get's cann't sculpt with the previous version of Editor Sculpt.

-I raise supported Unity Versions to Unity 2019.4 LTS.
 Sorry, for Unity 2019.1 user, but it nessally for improve compatibility for model import.

-Fixed bug that the brush blinking when you sculpt mesh with huge polygons.

-Improve brush display to draw brush even if a mouse is out of the mesh. 

-Improve sculpt speed a bit.

-Editor Sculpt assign Universal Render Pipeline compatible shaders for primitives if your project uses Universal Render Pipeline.

-Fixed bug that "Bake Animation to a mesh" button does'nt work in some case.


<v1.62>
-Fixed bug that EditorSculpt does'nt load the texture of the models with custom Scripted Importer.
 It means now EditorSculpt has compatibale with many extensions that support various file format of model such as UniVRM, Unity glTFast etc.

-Improve speed of Texture Paint a lot. At least over 2x speedup.

-Fixed slowdown when you paint the texture with the low poly mesh.

-Improve quality of Texture Paint a lot. Now you can draw a thin line easily.
 
-I decide to stop brush stroke if mouse button is up. This
 prevent unexpected line with Stroke Delay.

-Add new option item to advaced option menu,"Smooth Stroke". It improve brush stroke quality of "Texture Paint" brush, "Draw"/"Lower" brush,
 "Vertex Color" brush, "Draw Mask"/"Erase Mask" brush, "Vertex Weight"/"Erase Weight" brush a lot.
 But, it ignores "Brush Shapes" option.
 (Default value is "On").

-Fixed slowdown of Editor Window GUI such as change color or change Brush radius value.

-Fixed slowdown when you use EditorSculpt with the project that has huge mount of models.

-Fixed bug that Reference Image does'nt work in Unity 6000.0.

<v1.61>
-Fixed bug that a source model and  the instance of that model overlap when EditorSculpt make the instance of the imported model.
 I decide to this fix to be optional, to support  special cases when you want to place some models in fixed position.
 If you want to ignore this fix(Unsafe!), uncheck "Move overlap model(safe)" checkbox in the "Import Settins"
 foldout in the EditorSculpt window.

-Fixed bug that a mesh crashes when you use the Animation Move brush in some case.
 Sorry, if this bug crash your mesh. In this case simply open that model
 with latest vertsion of EditorSculpt to fix. 

-Fixed bug that a mesh become black with Unity2019 in some case.

-Improve speed of UNDO operations (CTRL+Z after sculpting) a lot. At least over 2x speedup.

-Fixed slowdown of UNDO operations when you do UNDO operations for many times.

-Fixed bug that Uinty shows error message when you load EditorSculpt.

-Various small bug fix and sppedup.

<v1.60>
-Improve Mesh loading speed alot.At least over 2x speedup.
 Maximum go well over 10x speedup depends on your project's contents.

-Add "Import setting" foldout. you can find many option for Load/Save mesh in that.
 EditorSculpt automatically save this options.

-Now EditorSculpt make a instance of a model and sculpt that,
 So,it never touches the original model.
 In this way, it preserve the model completely not only the asset model but also scene model that has not serialized.
 If you dislike that, you can revert that with checking "Don't Instantiate(Unsafe)" checkbox in the "Import Settins"
 foldout in the EditorSculpt window.

-Now EditorSculpt rename the model name from original name to the name with "_EditorSculpt" to
 work safely and get rid of destructive.

-Add the Enable/Disable button that appear when the EditorSculpt window is docked.
 In this way, you can disable EditorSculpt to get rid of the case that you can't select stuff anymore.

-Add ability to disable save prefab of each concerned mesh with option.
 You can do that with unchecking the "Import dependencies" checkbox in the "Import Settins" foldout in the EditorSculpt window.

-Add ability to diable "Save Prefab" dialog with option.
 You can do that with unchecking the "Show Save PrefabDialog" checkbox in the "Import Settins" foldout in the EditorSculpt window.

-Add ability to remove caution dialog when you use the AutoRemesh Sculpt.
 You can do that with unchecking the "Hide AutoRemesh Warning" checkbox in the "Show Advanced Options" foldout
 in the EditorSculpt window.

-Fixed bug that EditorSculpt make empty material and as a result, vail the model in some case.

-Fixed bug that you cann't save the animation clip in some case.

-Removed "Animation Tips" brush, because it's now completely integrated with "Animation Move" brush.
 You can do the same thing with "Animation Move" brush with select "Tips" int the SculptBoneFilter popup.

-Fixed bug that Animation Move brush does'nt work in some case.

-Improve GUI for add a blendshape to a model.

-Fixed bug that EditorSculpt changes mesh name when you add a blendshape.

-Add ability to rename blendshapes. You can do that with openning "Animation" foldout in the EditorSculpt window.
 And you can find "RenameBlendShape" foldout in that.
 Then, you can select a blendshape you want to rename with "Rename Blendshape:" popup,
 and you can rename blendshape with entering new name in the "Blend Shape Name" field.

-Various small bug fix and speedup.

<v1.59>
-Fixed bug that if you import the EditorSculpt to your project tiggers a re-import of all assets.

-Fixed slowdown when you use EditorSculpt with project that has many Assets.

-Fixed bug that EditorSculpt garble or destroy a model in some cases.

-Even previous version of EditorSculpt, it use the prefab of the model and does'nt change the model Asset as much as possible.
 Now it go ahead and  never change the original model, and it preserve the model completely.

-In previous version of EditorSculpt, it has ability to fix missing Asset if prefab has missing asset.
 But now it becomes now optional. Because recently version of Unity fix that automatelly.
 You can enable that again with checking the checkbox of "Fix misssing import" when you press the "Load Asset Mesh" button.

-Fixed bug that EditorSculpt gets error message when you sculpt the model that has material with no texture.

-Update "Readme.txt" and "Readme_Japanese.txt" to update with recently version of Unity and EditorSculpt.

<v1.58>
Immediate update for bug fix.

-Fixed bug that Editor Sculpt shows its Supported Unity Versions too heigh(Unity 2022.1).

-I raise Supported Unity Versions to Unity 2019.4 LTS. This means only "support"
 for Asset Strore and Package Manager and you can still use Editor Sculpt with Unity 2019.1. 

-Fixed wrong caution dialog when you delete animation bone for model with humanoid avatar.

-Fixed bug that Ediotor Sculpt make wrong animation clip when you use "Animation Move" brush
 with model with humanoid avatar.

<1.57>
-Fixed bug that when you trying to dock windows, Editor Sculpt window take the whole editor screen
 and you cann't even close it.
 Sorry, if this bug put your project or meshes to trouble.
 In this case you can fix that with chosing "Window/Layouts/Revert Factory Settings" in the Unity's menu.

-Improve compatibility with Unity 2022.1 a lot.

-Fixed bug that "Animation Move" brush does'nt work in Unity 2022.1.

-Fixed bug that "Animator Setup" does'nt work in Unity 2022.1.

-Fixed bug that symmetry sculpt does'nt work with the "Draw" or "Lower" brush.

-Fixed bug that the mask disappear when you add a reference image to the model.

-I unite "Animation Move" brush and "Animation Tips" brush.
 That is to say, you can move the bone tips with "Animation Move" brush.

-Added new bone select filter "Tips". With this filter , you can select tips of the bones.

<v1.56>
Improve compatibility with Unity 2021.2 a lot.

-Fixed bug that "Texture Paint" brush goes wrong when you paint the texture with the mesh that has both low poly part and heigh poly part in th same mesh.

-Fixed bug that Unity Editor goes wrong when you press "Preview Animation" button int the "Animation" foldout in th Editor Sculpt window with Unity 2021.2.

-Fixed bug that Unity Editor goes wrong when you import a Animation Clip.

-Fixed bug that the brush disappear in some case in Unity 2021.2.

-Fixed bug that Ediot Sculpt's message in the SceneView become unreadable in Unity 2021.2.

-Add new button "Import Animation". This button aviable when you select "Animation Move" brush or "Animation Tip" brush.

-Add new button "Reset All Advanced Option setting" in the "Show Advanced Options" foldout.
 This button reset all advanced option setting value to default value.

-Fixed bug that you see a wrong dialog when you select image with Open File Panel and cancel select.

-Add new option item to advaced option menu,"Accurate Brush Sample".
 If you turn this on, Improve quality of the painting-ish brushes such as "Texture Paint" brush,
 "Vertex Color" brush, "Vertex Weight" brush, "Erase Weight" brush, but slow down.

-Improve "BETA_Decal" brush and "BETA_Spline" brush a lot. But, still it's in work in progress beta brush.

<v1.55>
Immediate update for bug fix.
-Fixed bug that "Texture Paint" brush goes wrong when you paint the texture with the low poly mesh in EditorScult v1.54.

-Add new option item to advaced option menu, "Boost Texture Paint".
 With disabling this checkbox , you can revert the "Texture Paint" brush stroke's behaviour to previous version of Editor Sculpt.
 I certainly fixed bug for the new texture paint feature for EditorSculpt v1.54.
 but, even so, if you still troubled with that, turn this off.

-Fixed bug that "BETA_Decal" brush goes wrong in EditorSculpt 1.54.

-Fixed bug that "BETA_Texture" brush goes wrong in EditorSculpt 1.54.

<v1.54>
-A good deal of speed improvement of sculpting. Almost 30-40% of speed-up.

-Improve quality of the "Texture Paint" brush a lot.
 It improve brush stroke especially free-hand line drawing.

-Also improve quality of the painting-ish brushes such as "Vertex Color" brush, "Vertex Weight" brush, "Erase Weight" brush,
 "Draw Mask" brush, "Erase Mask" brush, "Draw" brush , "lower" brush.

-Also improve quality of the not working beta version of the painting-ish brushes such as "BETA_Texture" brush,
 and "BEAT_Decal" brush.

-Add a new option item for the painting-ish brushes, "Stroke Delay".
 Increase this value to enables brushes paint more accurately even if brush stroke delay occur, 
 So if the painting position and the mouse position are too far, ignoring that.
 decrease this value to wait until painting position reaches mouse position.

-Add new option item to advaced option menu, "Improve brush stroke".
 Disable this item to revert the painting-ish brushes behaviour to previous version of Editor Sculpt.
 You find this option item with opening "Show Advanced Options" foldout in the EditorSculpt window. 

-Add new option item to advanced option menu, "Brush Stroke Samples".
 Icrease this value to improve quality of painting-ish brushes, but slow down the speed of painting.

-Various small bug fix.

-Improve "BETA_Decal" brush a lot.But, still it's in work in progress beta brush.

<v1.53>
-Add ability to add a reference image that help sculpting the model.
 You can add a reference image with openning "Reference Image" foldout in the Editor Sculpt window.
 Then you see the "Create New Reference Image" dropdown button in the foldout.
 Pressing this button and select the axis for the reference image with popupmenu(i.e. "XY_Back").
 Then select the ".jpg" or ".png" image file for reference image on your PC or other devices.

-You can switch show/hide the reference image with opening/closing the "Reference Image" foldout 
 in the Editor Sculpt window.

-When openning the "Reference Image" foldout, you see "Edit Reference Image" foldout.
 Then opening this foldout to customize the reference image.

-In that "Edit Reference Image" foldout you see the "Delete Reference Image" button, and you can delete a Reference Image
 with pressing that button.
 
-You can transparent model to make reference image easy to see with checking the "Transparent Mesh" checkbox.

-Added "Clear Mask" button and "Invert Mask" button  they are available  when you select the "Draw Mask" or "Erase Mask" brush.

-Add a new option item for"Animation Move" brush, "Animation Move Mode" popup menu.
 Selecting this popup menu to switch the "Animation Move" brush's behavour.
 "Rotate" mode is the standard mode. This mode works same as the animation move brush of previous version of Editor Sculpt.
 "Transform" mode enable to translate position of the bone.
 "Scale" mode enables to extend/shorten the bone length.
 "Revert" mode enables to revert bone position to the default position.

-Add ability to save the model's animation pose as mesh.
 You can do that with pressing "Bake Animation to a mesh" button in the Editor Sculpt window.

-Changed method for delete a bone. Now you can select the bone for delete with the mouse. 

-Fixed bug that "BETA_Spline" brush and "BETA_Decal" brush does'nt work with Unity 2021.
 Also, I decide to use no additional MonoBehaviour script of that.

-Improve "BETA_Spline" brush and "BETA_Decal" brush a lot. But, still it's in work in progress beta brush.
 You can try that with select "Tools/EditorSculpt/Extra/TryBetaBrushes" in the Unity menu,
 then select "BETA_Spline" brush or "BETA_Decal" brush.

-Fiexed bug that Frame the model in the Scene View works too much.

-Fixed bug that you cann't select a bone correctly in some case. 

-Various small bug fix.

-Improve "BETA_BoneSpike" brush a lot.But, still it's in work in progress beta brush.
 You can test this brush with selecting "Tools/EditorSculpt/Extra/Try Beta Brushes(Auto Remesh)/BETA_BoneSpike" in the menu.

<v1.52>
-Now, you can use "Animation Move" brush in the AutoRemesh Sculpt mode with Dynamic tessellation.

-Fixed bug that the model lose Bone Weights when you subdivide a mesh with  pressing "Subdivide Mesh" button.

-Fixed bug that the model lose Bone Weights when you merge vertices with pressing "Merge Doubled Vertex"button.

-Fixed bug that the model lose Bone Weights when you sculpt a mesh with the AutoRemesh Sculpt.

-Fixed bug that Materials and Textures  gets error when you select the mesh asset in the hierarchy window and open the Editor Sculpt window.

-I decide to add the caution dialog when you close the mesh without saving.

-Removed "EditorSculpt-Editor.pdb" file and "EditorSculpt-Editor.dll.mdb" file taht was legacy format and unnecessary for recent version of the Unity.

-Improve the speed of Sculpt a bit (5-10%).

-Add new not working beta brush "BETA_BoneSpike".
 This brush add spikes on your mesh.
 For now, this brush add only spikes, but I plan to add ability to add various kids of shapes such as tubes, leaves , Japanese Anime charactor's hairs,
 glass, tentacles and so on.
 Also I plan to add bones to the sikes and animate spikes without setting up the animations.
 This brush is only aviable for AutoRemesh Sculpt, and not for Standard Sculpt. 
 You can test this brush with selecting "Tools/EditorSculpt/Extra/Try Beta Brushes(Auto Remesh)/BETA_BoneSpike" in the menu.

-Various small bug fix.

<v1.51>
-Fixed bug that you cann't UNDO with the edit/UNDO menu in Editor Sculpt 1.50.

-Fixed bug that a animation clip goes wrong when you cancel "save animation clip" SaveFilePanel.

-Added the "Override without dialog" checkbox int the Editor Sculpt Window.
 If you turn this on, you can add a bone with "Add a new Bone" button without showing the dialog.

-Fixed bug that "Animation tip" brush shows wrong bones when you sculpt a model with Generic Avatar.

<v1.50>
-Now, Editor Sculpt can sculpt not only the mesh vertices but also sculpt the bones for the animations!
 2 new brushes enables you to do that.

-Add the new brush "Animation Move" brush.
 This brush is the released version of "BETA_BoneMove" brush in Editor Sculpt1.42 or before.
 This brush is similar to "Move" brush, but it moves the bones for animation, not the meshe vertices.

-You see the "Animation Time" slider in the left top of the scene view when you select the "Animation Move" brush.
 You can select the time of animation with changing the value of the slider.

-Editor Sculpt saves the bones for animation to the animation clip automatically 
 when you sculpt and change the value of the "Animation Time" slider.
 The animation clip has compatibility to Unity's Mecanim Animation System, so you can edit that animation clip with Unity's
 Animation tools.

-"Animation Move" brush supports both Generic and Humanoid animations. But, for the best performance,
 I recommend that you should use humanoid animation bones.
 Because you can sculpt with additional feature such as the bone angle limitation or the bone symmetry.

-"Animation Move" brush has ability to edit the pose of the existing animation clip too.
 You see the "Select Aniamtions" popup in the Editor Sculpt window when you select "Animation Move" brush.
 Then you can select animation clip to edit with selecting the "[Import a Aniamtion]" option in the popup.

-Add th new brush "Animation Tip" brush. this brush is similar to "Animation Move" brush, but it can only move 
the tips of the models, such as the tips of the finger or tips of the foot.

-Fixed bug that UNDO the painting Vertex Color with "CTRL+Z" key go wrong.

-Fixed bug that "Add a new bone" button go wrong.

-Editor Sculpt now recreate RuntimeAnimatorController when you press "Add a new bone" button.
 This will fix many bugs.

-Fixed bug that "Import Animation" button does'nt work with the generic animation clips.

-Add new button "Reset Bindpose" to the animation foldout in the Editor Sculpt window.

-Change "Ok" and "Cancel" button position of some of the dialog.

-Bring the "Readme" text up to date with the recently version of Editor Sculpt.

-Various small bug fix.

<v1.42>
-Fixed bug that you cann't sculpt meshes that has Skinned Meshrender in Editor Sculpt1.40 or 1.41.

-Fixed bug that blendshapes gets wrong when that contains blend shape frames if you press "Merge Verts" button
 or, if you press "Subdivide Standard" button.

-Improve "BETA_BoneMove" brush a lot.But, still it's in work in progress beta brush.
 You can try that with select "Tools/EditorSculpt/Extra/TryBetaBrushes" in the Unity menu,
 then select "BETA_BoneMove" brush.

<v1.41>
-Fixed slowdown in Editor Sculpt 1.40.

-Fixed bug that "Draw"/"Lower" brush get's wrong when you sculpt meshes with sumeshes.

-Fixed bug that "Add a new bone" button get's wrong when you sculpt with sumeshes.

-Fixed bug that some polygons gets black temporary when you sculpt with AutoRemesh sculpt.

-Add new advanced option menu "Calc Mesh Normals".It slowdown sculpt speed, but fixes some issues with mesh normals.

<v1.40>
Improve compatibility of the mesh with FBX format and  the mesh in Unity Asset store a lot.
Now, most of the mesh works fine that get's error with previous version of Editor Sculpt.

-Fixed bug that Editor Sculpt turns existing models black if the model has submeshes.

-Fixed bug that Editor Sculpt gets existing model wrong if the model has Skinned Meshrender in some case.

-Fixed bug that a mesh gets wrong when you smoothen a mesh with "Smooth Mesh" button in "Edit Mesh" foldout in the Editor Sculpt window.

-Fixed bug that blendshapes gets wrong when that contains blend shape frames.

-Fixed bug taht mesh gets black when you press the "Merge Vertices" button.

-Fixed bug that Editor Sculpt delete Blend Shape when you press "Merge Vertices" button in "Edit Mesh" foldout in the Editor Sculpt window.

-Fixed bug that Editor Sculpt change a mesh to small when you do Undo action with Auto Remesh Sculpt.

-Fixed bug that advanced option "Realtime AutoRemesh" does'nt work with symmetry on.
